content:
!! EXTREME HAZARD. DO NOT DISTURB UNDER ANY CIRCUMSTANCES. !!
ITEM NUMBERSCP-9098
CONTAINMENT CLASSKETER
SECONDARY CLASSAPOLLYON
DISRUPTION CLASSAMIDA
RISK CLASSCRITICAL
// SPECIAL CONTAINMENT PROCEDURES

SCP-9098 is to be kept dormant and not disrupted. No one knows what it is capable of. Somehow the Bevere Family managed to keep this beast contained.

// DESCRIPTION

SCP-9098 is a large scaled entity of unknown origin. Not much is known about it other than being extremely powerful, almost able to stand against the Scarlet King. Though not as strong as the Scarlet, it does present a major risk to humanity if it ever wakes up. The world is doomed. SCP-9098 is mainly posted and dormant within Pandora's Acolytes main HQ, yet somehow the Bevere family was able to capture it, and use vestiges and/or samples from the anomaly to then research it and learn more about it. They learned that the flesh of the entity was made up of a material that is really rare and almost impossible to obtain, requiring you to almost extract space itself for such material. And the material itself can't be created nor destroyed, so how come this great mistake of life even exist? The creature must be made up from a decaying black hole, a really old black hole. Though this explanation might not make sense, it is really important to keep in mind that when black holes die, they don't release anything other than very strong Gamma radiation millions of astronomical units away, like a dying star. So the resolution must be that this insanely powerful anomaly must come from either a dying star or a black hole. Which is almost impossible to happen, though black holes may let things escape if the gravitational pull is strong enough to beat the size of the black hole and gravitational pull of the black hole.

Though its powers remain unknown since it's dormant, people around the Bevere family appear to have heard that they may have done a contract or a deal. If the anomaly is ever disturbed, it may cause an end of the world scenario, just like The Door To Another Dimension, though this doesn't require any ritual and only must stay dormant. The anomaly has also been known to provide passive protection around Pandora's Acolytes HQ, like some sort of kinetic shield. The anomaly has also appeared to have bent reality the way it wanted to, even surviving a black hole and possibly fusing it with itself. Though this is not known, it is just a rumour around Site REDACTED. As it currently appears, Pandora's Acolytes is currently sheltering it like a lost animal. Only God knows what they're doing with it.

// EREBUS RESEARCH LOG
[OPENING LOG D-02]

Welcome to Erebus Research Division, where we experiment, study and research.

T H E A N O M A L O U S I S N T S A F E F R O M O U R G R A S P.

Erebus Research was made on 25/12/1906, way before the main GOI was even set up. Because back then, weaponry wasn't much decent, but they had thought of it when it was eventually given to soldiers in the First World War. The Bevere family had caught a glimpse of the anomalous; they saw SCP-9098. An anomaly classified Keter-Apollyon of origins unknown, but the Bevere family somehow and somewhat trapped SCP-9098 within Pandora's Acolytes HQ, seemingly from a deal or contract between both. SCP-9098 ends up giving the HQ passive protections, some sort of kinetic shield against anything and anyone. It has been dormant ever since the contract was made. If something disturbs its sleep, it's the end of the world, or possibly the end of the world, as most of its abilities and capabilities have remained unknown and are yet to be researched. Erebus Research has been taking samples from SCP-9098 for testing and research. It appears that its flesh is made up of dark matter and anti-matter, meaning it wouldn't even be able to be created in the first place! Because dark matter can't be created nor destroyed, nor can anti-matter. Though it is only a matter of time when the anomaly wakes up. Also keep in mind that dark matter, an unobtainable state of matter, is really expensive. REALLY expensive due to its rarity.

Erebus Research was eventually made into a division while the combatants became the main faction.
